case_title: BENJAMIN W GALE VS. VALENTINO FAZZARI ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15281068) FILED BY DEFENDANT FAZZARI, VALENTINO

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN GALE'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO JUDICIAL FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), DOCUMENT DEMAND (SET ONE), FOR ORDER DIRECTING DEFENDANT FAZZARI TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS. AND FOR AN ORDER DIRECTING DEFENDANT FAZZARI AND HIS ATTORNEY TO PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS - THE MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND DOCUMENT DEMAND IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ALL OBJECTIONS ARE WAIVED. DEFENDANT TO SERVE WRITTEN RESPONSES AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,285.00 IS GRANTED. PAYMENT TO BE MADE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN GALE's Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Judicial Form Interrogatories (Set One), Document Demand (Set One), For Order Directing Defendant Fazzari To Produce Documents. And For An Order Directing Defendant Fazzari And His Attorney To Pay Monetary Sanctions - The motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and document demand is GRANTED. No opposition filed.
